summary: Iteration-3 deltas verified end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 new pytest cases pass (PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id} for all valid statuses, invalid 400, missing 404, no-token 401; WhatsApp no-op log line confirmed and booking still confirmed via mock-pay). All 24 regression tests from iteration 1+2 still green. Frontend: HeroMarquee, PressStrip, HowItWorks (data-testid=how-section, 4 step cards), InstagramGrid (data-testid=instagram-section, 6 instagram-post-* cards) all render; service-card-tn-30 has 'Most Loved' badge, service-card-ak-60 has 'Deepest Journey' badge, tn-45/ak-45/ak-60 carry 'Save ₹500' chips; @guidance_angel7 handle and IG link to /guidance_angel7/ found in 9 places (footer/contact/CTA). Admin dashboard: shadcn Calendar+Popover replaces native date picker; payment + status filter buttons present and counter updates; status dropdown PATCH flow verified — clicking status-set-completed-{id} fires PATCH, returns 200, persists in DB (post-update booking_status='completed') and shows toast 'Marked completed ✦'.
action_items: (Minor / non-blocking) HowItWorks step cards do not currently have per-step data-testids (only how-section / how-heading / how-cta). Adding data-testid="how-step-{n}" on each card would make the spec literally testable; cards are present and visible.

(Optional) backend tests/test_blocked_dates_and_email.py uses os.environ[...] hard-required (KeyError if not set in shell). When run inside the supervisor backend env this works, but in the bare pytest env we had to export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL manually. Consider falling back to the same pattern as test_backend_api.py (env.get with default) OR loading frontend/.env at top of the test module.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id} — validation list and 404/400/401 paths look correct; status persisted via $set, response returns success+booking_status. Good.

whatsapp_service.py _is_configured() correctly treats values starting with 'PLACEHOLDER' as unconfigured. send_booking_whatsapp logs 'WHATSAPP not configured – skipping send' and returns None — non-blocking by design (verified via verify-payment which still confirmed booking).
server.py wraps both email and WhatsApp side-effects in try/except so neither can break the booking confirmation flow — exactly the right pattern.
AdminDashboard.jsx — status badge updates locally on success (good UX), and updateBookingStatus calls PATCH with bearer token; toast wording 'Marked {status} ✦' is consistent.
InstagramGrid uses data-testid="instagram-post-{i}" (not ig-card-* as the spec described) — confirmed 6 cards render. Naming is fine; just a doc/spec mismatch.
BookingStatusUpdate Pydantic model could use Literal[...] for stricter typing instead of str + manual allowed-set check, but functionally equivalent.
test_credentials: Admin jenika / guidance@2026 verified working. Razorpay mock mode active (placeholder keys). WhatsApp env vars are PLACEHOLDER_* on purpose — verified the no-op skip path. Resend live but only delivers to verified guidance.angel7@gmail.com.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned 5 TEST_ bookings during pytest run + 1 TEST_AdminUI booking during UI test (also cleaned). DB now has 0 bookings + 0 blocked dates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 fully stable. Endpoint PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id} with body {booking_status: 'pending'|'confirmed'|'completed'|'cancelled'|'no_show'}. WhatsApp no-op log signature: 'WHATSAPP not configured – skipping send' (em-dash, INFO level). Admin filter testids: filter-pay-{all|paid|pending|failed} and filter-status-{all|pending|confirmed|completed|cancelled|no_show}. Status dropdown trigger: status-dropdown-{bookingId}; menu items: status-set-{status}-{bookingId}. InstagramGrid card testids are instagram-post-{0..5} (NOT ig-card-*). HowItWorks does not yet expose per-step testids — only how-section / how-heading / how-cta.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in iteration 3 deltas. WhatsApp no-op behaviour validated by snapshotting backend log size before verify-payment and confirming the new chunk contains 'WHATSAPP not configured – skipping send' while the booking still flips to paid+confirmed.
